type_definitions.name: TrackId
type_definitions.description: Value object for a track identifier. Currently imported directly by CLI in 25 files. After migration, the CLI will pass raw strings to usecase boundaries; usecase constructs TrackId internally. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: CommitHash
type_definitions.description: Value object for a git commit hash string. Currently constructed by CLI and passed to usecase. After migration, usecase accepts raw Option<String> commit hash and constructs CommitHash internally. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: Decision
type_definitions.description: Domain enum for guard/hook Allow/Block decisions. Currently imported by CLI guard and hook commands. After migration, CLI sees only usecase-owned GuardDecision enum; domain::Decision stays internal to usecase/infrastructure. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).
